en.eNote: No meals logged for Jul 10 – Jul 16 (last intake log: Jun 14), so the energy and burn charts assume the 2,000 kcal plan. Garmin active burn averaged ~343 kcal/day, peaking 684 on Tuesday's hack squat and 630 on Monday's 2.2 km pool intervals. Three of the seven days were near-zero: Friday (32 kcal) and Wednesday (95 kcal, the planned swim didn't happen) were rest, and Thursday (Jul 16) is just starting — squat is planned.
en.bNote: Net exercise = Garmin active calories; standing BMR 2,414. Intake assumes 2,000 kcal all seven days (none logged after Jun 14), so the implied balance ≈ −757 kcal/day is exercise-driven, not measured. Thursday (Jul 16) just starting.
en.wNote: Bridge shows the last logged meals (Jun 12–14) — no intake was logged for the displayed week. Negative balance = deficit.
en.i1t: A lighter week: 4 sessions, and the planned Wednesday swim was missed
en.i1: The window carries 4 sessions across 4 active days (3h30, ~2,401 active kcal) — down from 6 sessions and 5h07 a week ago. Wednesday's planned swim intervals never happened (95 active kcal, no session logged), leaving three effectively blank days: Friday, Wednesday and today's start. Nothing here looks like overreach; the load simply thinned out in the back half.
en.i2t: Tuesday's hack squat was the week's heaviest strength day
en.i2: Tuesday's hack squat ran 60 min at avg HR 121 (max 154) for 606 active kcal, and the day's 684 daily active kcal topped the window. Saturday's trap-bar deadlift was the other lift: 49 min, avg HR 119, max 149, 497 kcal. Neither is Hevy-logged, so tonnage and per-set HR peaks are still missing — the Jul 7 hack squat (13,986 kg) remains the last logged lift and has now rolled well out of the window.
en.i3: Aerobic work came from two swims. Monday's 2.2 km interval set (10×100 / 10×50) was the hardest session of the week — avg HR 133, max 155, 64 min — and its 819 kcal was the biggest single-session burn. Sunday's easy 1.0 km (37 min, avg HR 121) filled in the light volume. With Wednesday's intervals missed, swim volume for the window stopped at 3.2 km.
en.i4: This morning HRV rebounded to 38 (+6 vs the previous night, level with the 38 average) and RHR eased to 55 (−2) with stress at a window-low 21 — a clean reversal of yesterday's HRV 32 / RHR 57 dip after Tuesday's lift. The night was short (6h53 off a late 23:33 bedtime, −54m vs the 7h47 average) but its best-quality: score 83, deep sleep a window-high 96m, awake just 4m. Wednesday's unplanned rest is the likely reason.
en.rec: Thursday's plan calls for squat, and the recovery markers back it: HRV 38, RHR 55 and stress 21 are all restored after Tuesday's hack squat, off a short but high-quality 6h53 night at score 83. The week behind is lighter than planned — 4 sessions across 4 active days (3h30, ~2,401 active kcal): Saturday's trap-bar deadlift, Sunday's easy 1 km, Monday's 2.2 km intervals and Tuesday's hack squat, with Wednesday's intervals missed. That leaves room rather than fatigue, so take the squat at full planned effort. Next: squat today, rest Friday, trap-bar deadlift Saturday. If you want the missed swim back, Sunday's open slot is the cleanest place for it.
en.foot: Data: 2026-07-10 → 2026-07-16 · Garmin fenix 8 + Hevy + Intervals.icu via Freddy
en.foot2: plan: Mon swim · Tue hack squat · Wed swim intervals · Thu squat · Fri rest · Sat trap-bar DL · Sun rest/hike/bike

hr.k3d: 2 snage · 2 plivanja · samo Garmin (nema Hevy volumena)
hr.eNote: Nema zabilježenih obroka za 10.7. – 16.7. (zadnji unos: 14.6.), pa grafovi energije i potrošnje pretpostavljaju planskih 2.000 kcal. Garmin aktivna potrošnja prosj. ~343 kcal/dan, vrhunac 684 na utorkovom hack squatu i 630 na ponedjeljkovim bazenskim intervalima 2,2 km. Tri od sedam dana bila su gotovo prazna: petak (32 kcal) i srijeda (95 kcal, planirano plivanje nije odrađeno) bili su odmor, a četvrtak (16.7.) tek počinje — planiran je čučanj.
hr.bNote: Neto trening = Garmin aktivne kalorije; standardni BMR 2.414. Unos pretpostavlja 2.000 kcal svih sedam dana (ništa zabilježeno nakon 14.6.), pa je implicirana bilanca ≈ −757 kcal/dan posljedica treninga, ne mjerena. Četvrtak (16.7.) tek počinje.
hr.wNote: Most prikazuje zadnje zabilježene obroke (12.–14.6.) — za prikazani tjedan nema unosa. Negativna bilanca = deficit.
hr.i1t: Lakši tjedan: 4 treninga, a planirano srijedino plivanje je propušteno
hr.i1: Prozor nosi 4 treninga kroz 4 aktivna dana (3h30, ~2.401 aktivnih kcal) — manje nego 6 treninga i 5h07 prije tjedan dana. Srijedini planirani bazenski intervali nisu se dogodili (95 aktivnih kcal, nema zabilježenog treninga), pa su tri dana ostala praktički prazna: petak, srijeda i početak današnjeg dana. Ništa ovdje ne izgleda kao pretreniranost; opterećenje se jednostavno prorijedilo u drugoj polovici.
hr.i2t: Utorkov hack squat bio je najteži dan snage u tjednu
hr.i2: Utorkov hack squat trajao je 60 min uz prosj. puls 121 (maks 154) i 606 aktivnih kcal, a dnevnih 684 aktivne kcal bilo je najviše u prozoru. Subotnje trap-bar mrtvo dizanje bilo je drugi trening snage: 49 min, prosj. puls 119, maks 149, 497 kcal. Nijedan nije zabilježen u Hevyju, pa nedostaju tonaža i vrhovi pulsa po seriji — hack squat od 7.7. (13.986 kg) ostaje zadnji zabilježeni trening i sada je dobrano izašao iz prozora.
hr.i3: Aerobni rad došao je iz dva plivanja. Ponedjeljkov intervalni set 2,2 km (10×100 / 10×50) bio je najteži trening tjedna — prosj. puls 133, maks 155, 64 min — a njegovih 819 kcal najveća je potrošnja pojedinačnog treninga. Nedjeljnih laganih 1,0 km (37 min, prosj. puls 121) popunilo je laganu volumenu. Uz propuštene srijedine intervale, plivački volumen prozora stao je na 3,2 km.
hr.i4t: Oporavak: pokazatelji su se preko noći resetirali
hr.i4: Jutros se HRV oporavio na 38 (+6 vs prethodna noć, u razini s prosjekom od 38), RHR je pao na 55 (−2), a stres je najniži u prozoru — 21. To je čist obrat jučerašnjeg pada (HRV 32 / RHR 57) nakon utorkovog treninga. Noć je bila kratka (6h53 uz kasno lijeganje u 23:33, −54m vs prosjek od 7h47), ali najkvalitetnija: ocjena 83, duboki san na vrhuncu prozora od 96m, budnost samo 4m. Srijedin neplanirani odmor vjerojatan je razlog.
hr.rec: Četvrtak po planu donosi čučanj, a pokazatelji oporavka to podupiru: HRV 38, RHR 55 i stres 21 vratili su se nakon utorkovog hack squata, uz kratku ali kvalitetnu noć od 6h53 i ocjenu 83. Tjedan iza lakši je od planiranog — 4 treninga kroz 4 aktivna dana (3h30, ~2.401 aktivnih kcal): subotnje trap-bar mrtvo dizanje, nedjeljnih laganih 1 km, ponedjeljkovi intervali 2,2 km i utorkov hack squat, uz propuštene srijedine intervale. To ostavlja prostor, a ne umor, pa odradi čučanj punim planiranim naporom. Sljedeće: čučanj danas, odmor u petak, trap-bar mrtvo dizanje u subotu. Ako želiš nadoknaditi propušteno plivanje, nedjeljni slobodan termin najčišće je mjesto za to.
hr.foot: Podaci: 10.7. → 16.7.2026. · Garmin fenix 8 + Hevy + Intervals.icu putem Freddyja
hr.foot2: plan: pon plivanje · uto hack squat · sri intervali · čet squat · pet odmor · sub trap-bar MD · ned odmor/planina/bicikl
